text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text: Huh? You want me on your soccer team?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I got invited to play on our day off, and
we're looking for more teammates!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I mean I like watching soccer, but I don't really have much experience playing it...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you don't? But you were so good in the mini
soccer match!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I-I was? I guess I did play a liiittle soccer with
my dad as a kid.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, no wonder, then! That must be why you had
such a lovely dribble form!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text: L-lovely?! Oh gosh, you're being way too kind!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
No, I really mean it! You were running with that
ball like you'd been friends with it forever. You
were so cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Really! That's why I figured you'd be a super
strong addition to the team!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Oooh... Well if you put it that way, I guess I can
give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! So you're game? Thanks so much!
